intro: Lepidagathis kameyamana, a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, is a medicinal herb traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine. The health benefits of Lepidagathis kameyamana include its potential to treat various inflammatory conditions, such as arthritis and bronchitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Lepidagathis kameyamana include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
